title: Add Heimlern offline recall consumer
goal: Add a proposal-only offline adapter that lets heimlern consume operator recall exports for learning proposals without changing live routing or operator policy.

metadata.source: deferred from PR #116; current PR only exposes offline_proposal_only boundary metadata
metadata.non_goal: Does not alter live routing, merge policy, task priority or runtime capabilities.

acceptance.assertion: Heimlern input contract accepts bounded recall exports and preserves source_trust/evidence_binding/non-claims.
Adapter emits proposals only, never live routing_weight_adjustment or policy mutation.
Every proposal links back to recall evidence_refs and states what the evidence does not prove.
Missing, malformed or unverified recall input produces no-op/degraded output, not speculative learning.
Focused tests cover valid recall export, unverified sources, malformed input and no live routing mutation.
